task_description: Build a complete social network mobile application using React Native + Expo with a unique minimalist design system, full navigation, feed, chat, profile, settings, and a Vercel-ready serverless backend. The app must be immediately testable via Expo Go on a real iPhone.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes with 0 errors. Expo web export builds successfully (19 routes, 935+ modules). Jest passes with no tests (acceptable for greenfield MVP). All 8 v1 review issues and 3 v2 review polish items addressed.
